html.zh: 第一篇论文发表于 1960 年 4 月 《ACM 通讯》，DOI 为 10.1145/367177.367224。贝尔实验室 档案保存了 1961 年续篇，其中 王浩 讨论了谓词演算证明过程及相关判定问题情形。
html.en: The first paper appeared in Communications of the ACM in April 1960, with DOI 10.1145/367177.367224. Bell Labs' archive preserves the 1961 continuation, where Wang describes proof procedures for predicate calculus and related decision-problem cases.

html.zh: 展示重点是由模式引导的证明归约：把公式转换成可识别的逻辑形状，应用规则拆分或简化它们，并在出现证明条件时闭合分支。
html.en: The key display idea is pattern-guided proof reduction: transform formulas into recognizable logical shapes, apply rules to split or simplify them, and close branches when a proof condition appears.

html.zh: 专家通常把王氏算法视为自动定理证明的早期里程碑。它的长期影响在于缩小了形式逻辑与机器执行之间的距离，并影响了后来的证明过程和 SAT 式推理。
html.en: Experts generally treat Wang's algorithm as an early milestone in automated theorem proving. Its long-term legacy is that it narrowed the gap between formal logic and machine execution, influencing later proof procedures and SAT-style reasoning.

notes.zh: 由 legacy AI100 数据批量生成的 variant。
notes.en: Variant generated from legacy AI100 data in a batch migration.

role.zh: 提出基于模式识别的定理证明过程

quote.en: "A proof procedure for the predicate calculus is given"
quote.zh: "给出了一个谓词演算的证明过程"

workTitle.en: Proving Theorems by Pattern Recognition - II
workTitle.zh: 通过模式识别证明定理（二）

workAuthors.en: Hao Wang, Bell System Technical Journal, 1961
workAuthors.zh: 王浩, 《贝尔系统技术期刊》, 1961

quotePage.en: BenchCouncil AI100: Automated theorem proving / Wang's algorithm
quotePage.zh: BenchCouncil AI100：自动定理证明 / 王氏算法

quoteAttribution.en: Proving Theorems by Pattern Recognition - II, Hao Wang, Bell System Technical Journal, 1961
quoteAttribution.zh: 《通过模式识别证明定理（二）》, 王浩, 《贝尔系统技术期刊》, 1961

material.zh: CACM 论文 + 贝尔实验室 文章

text.en: The procedure looks for logical forms that match known rule patterns. Matching turns theorem proving into a sequence of recognizable transformations.
text.zh: 该过程寻找能够匹配已知规则模式的逻辑形式。匹配让定理证明变成一串可识别的变换。

text.en: A complex formula is reduced into smaller subgoals until branches close or require further search. This helped avoid pure truth-table enumeration.
text.zh: 复杂公式被归约成更小的子目标，直到分支闭合或继续搜索。这有助于避免纯真值表枚举。

text.en: Wang's work framed mathematical proof as something machines could perform using symbolic rules and carefully designed procedures.
text.zh: 王浩的工作把数学证明表述为机器可以通过符号规则和精心设计的过程来执行的任务。

title.en: Proving theorems by pattern recognition I
title.zh: 《通过模式识别证明定理 I》
